summary: Completed testing for Notes UI positioning (Instagram-style on avatar), emoji picker, 10-day forecast, and Offline Mode auto-sync. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Notes UI positioned at top-left of avatar (-top-1 -left-1), emoji picker with 12 surf emojis, Offline Mode card with auto-sync toggle and sync nearby button.
critical_code_review_comments: Notes UI correctly positioned at -top-1 -left-1 (ON avatar top-left corner, Instagram-style) in Profile.js lines 589 and 605
Emoji picker implemented with 12 surf emojis (data-testid='emoji-picker') in Profile.js lines 1417-1429
Forecast API defaults to 10 days (conditions.py line 158: days: int = 10)
SpotConditions.js getForecastDays returns 10 for premium users (line 18)
Offline Mode card in Settings.js has auto-sync toggle (data-testid='auto-sync-toggle') and sync nearby button (data-testid='sync-nearby-btn')
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notes UI is positioned ON the avatar (top-left corner like Instagram) using -top-1 -left-1 classes. Emoji picker has 12 surf emojis. Forecast API returns 10 days by default. Offline Mode has auto-sync toggle and sync nearby spots button.
